pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 21 instead of separate source/target flags.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated for modern Java versions; using 'release' ensures the code compiles against the correct API and class file version for JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 class file formats correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven properties to set the compiler source and target to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project properties must align with the plugin configuration to ensure consistent compilation settings across the build.

src/main/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern API usage.
Add import for ThreadLocalRandom to support the new random number generation logic.
